steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The previous sentence establishes that isolation came soon after discovery for many elements — but not all. The blank opens a new clause: "____ the isolation process took years," with radium as the example. The blank must signal that this was true for only some elements, not all.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Thus,": signals a result, but the sentence is giving an occasional exception, not a consequence. ✗
  • "However,": signals contrast, but the previous sentence already establishes the contrast; the blank needs a frequency/qualification signal. ✗
  • "Moreover,": signals an addition of a parallel point. This is a qualification, not an addition. ✗
  • "Sometimes,": signals that the pattern (years-long isolation) held in some but not all cases — exactly what the radium example illustrates. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
